provenance.source_corpus: Natural analogues of degraded ecosystems enhance conservation and reconstruction in extreme environments

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:5a3f4f30af46
edges.original_sentence: Resident communities doubled in species richness following alvar species addition, supporting 17–20 species/0.18 m 2 (95% conﬁdence interval) and providing refuge to regionally restricted or threatened species including Iris lacustris , Solidago ptarmicoides , and Liatris cylindracea .

source_spans.text: Resident communities doubled in species richness following alvar species addition, supporting 17–20 species/0.18 m 2 (95% conﬁdence interval) and providing refuge to regionally restricted or threatened species including Iris lacustris , Solidago ptarmicoides , and Liatris cylindracea .

source_document.title: Natural analogues of degraded ecosystems enhance conservation and reconstruction in extreme environments

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:5a3f4f30af46
edges.original_sentence: Alvar species established successfully under a range of microsite conditions manipulated to alter suspected constraints on colonization, including nitrogen deﬁciency, excessive CaCO 3, and competition with weeds.

source_spans.text: Alvar species established successfully under a range of microsite conditions manipulated to alter suspected constraints on colonization, including nitrogen deﬁciency, excessive CaCO 3, and competition with weeds.

source_document.title: Natural analogues of degraded ecosystems enhance conservation and reconstruction in extreme environments

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:ec05ac9c6236
edges.original_sentence: Quarry colonization by alvar species was thus not limited by substrate N deﬁciency but concentrated limestone tailings in quarry substrate moderately constrained community assembly.

source_spans.text: Quarry colonization by alvar species was thus not limited by substrate N deﬁciency but concentrated limestone tailings in quarry substrate moderately constrained community assembly.

source_document.title: Natural analogues of degraded ecosystems enhance conservation and reconstruction in extreme environments
